summary: Verified 3 new features + regressions end-to-end via BOTH backend pytest and Playwright against the external URL. Backend: 32/33 pytest PASS (1 pre-existing failure carried over from iteration_3 that is NOT a regression — see below). Added 12 new backend tests covering DELETE /api/checkins/{id}, POST /api/checkins/bulk-delete, DELETE /api/checkins?job_id=, auth guards for all three (401 without cookie), invalid-id 404, empty-ids handled, and Job success_heading/success_body/success_button_label defaults + persistence + presence in public GET /api/jobs. Frontend: created a job with custom success message, submitted a public check-in with granted geolocation (40.7128,-74.006) - VERIFIED no green success toast appears (polled `[data-sonner-toast][data-type="success"]` for 2s after clicking share-location-btn → 0 matches), success box shows custom heading 'TEST v5 Custom Heading', custom body, and custom button label 'TEST v5 Do it again' (all via data-testid success-heading/body + checkin-again-btn). Check-Ins tab: none-selected hint = 'Tip: select check-ins below to show only those pins on the map.'; selecting 2 rows → hint 'Showing 2 selected pin(s) on the map.' and Delete Selected label shows '(2)'; select-all correctly toggles to N; Show all button clears selection. Deletion: single-row trash button removes the row and DB (verified via GET); bulk-delete of 5 rows persists (API count=0); Clear All (with filter set to specific job) persists to 0. Regressions PASS: admin login with httpOnly cookie, /api/auth/me returns admin, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/jobs work, jobs render in Jobs tab, public check-in still stores lat/long and shows in admin table + map.

minor.issue: test_migration_added_contact_fields still fails on job 6a57e6d07976af16733fa8ed which has only {full_name} — a prior admin-edit test in iteration_3 removed both email and phone from that migrated job. The migration only prepends fields when form_heading is missing (one-shot). This is a stale test assertion, not a real bug. Recommendation: relax assertion to 'full_name in keys' only OR reset that seed job.

action_items: LOW: Fix stale assertion in test_migration_added_contact_fields (relax to 'full_name in keys' OR reseed job 6a57e6d07976af16733fa8ed with email/phone).
LOW (carry-over): AdminDashboard.js is now 633 lines (grew again with new deletion + success-message UI) — consider splitting CheckInsTab / JobsTab / JobDialog / SettingsTab into separate files.
LOW (carry-over): copyLink still uses navigator.clipboard.writeText without try/catch (line 290 AdminDashboard.js).
LOW (carry-over): create_checkin in server.py uses substring matching ('name' in k / 'email' in k) — could collide with keys like 'company_name'/'emergency_contact_email'. Prefer exact key priority.

LOW: DELETE /api/checkins with no job_id will wipe EVERY check-in in the DB across all jobs. This is intentional per code but there is no additional safeguard (e.g., confirmation on the API level or admin-only role check beyond auth). Consider requiring an explicit ?confirm=all query param for the no-filter case.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py bulk_delete_checkins silently ignores invalid ObjectIds (returns deleted=0 when all invalid). Good defensive behavior; consistent with the API test.

AdminDashboard.CheckInsTab uses window.confirm() for delete confirmation — works but is a native dialog with limited styling; not consistent with the app's shadcn look. Consider AlertDialog for polish (not a blocker).

CheckInPage.js correctly removed the toast.success on submission — only the success box replaces the form. Error paths still toast (validate error + geolocation error + POST failure), which is correct.

JobDialog `save` sends success_heading/body/button_label with sensible defaults if the field is blank — good. The Job model on the backend also has defaults, so blank fields still render meaningful success box.
Selection state (selectedIds) is a Set kept only in CheckInsTab component state — cleared correctly on job filter change (line 176), on Show all (line 251), and after any successful delete. Good.

MapView `markers={mapRows}` correctly recomputes to selected-only when selectedIds.size > 0. `recenterTo` is set to mapCenter only when mapRows.length > 0 which prevents recenter on empty selection — good.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 12 new tests in TestCheckIns for single-delete/bulk-delete/clear + auth guards, plus 3 tests for success_* fields on Job)

success_rate.backend: 97% (32/33 pytest — 1 stale assertion carry-over, not a regression)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 new features + regressions verified end-to-end via Playwright)

test_credentials: admin@techspider.site / Admin@12345 (verified working via cookie httpOnly access_token)
seed_data_creation: During UI testing, created and deleted job 'TEST_UI_v5_SuccessMsg' (id 6a5c1f01296a7ab34627e5e9) and multiple TEST_UI_v5_* check-ins. Cleanup completed — only 'TechSpider Site — Downtown Tower' seed job remains, with pre-existing Alice/Bob/Carol/Jane check-ins from earlier iterations still present (not created by this run and left intact per user preference).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public check-in requires page.context.grant_permissions(['geolocation'], origin=BASE) + set_geolocation({latitude, longitude}) BEFORE clicking share-location-btn. To skip the consent modal in tests, create the job with consent_enabled=false (JobDialog exposes the switch as data-testid=consent-enabled-switch). The admin CheckInsTab polls /api/checkins every 5s — always wait >5.5s after seeding rows via API before asserting row count in DOM. To detect the (absence of) green success toast, poll `document.querySelectorAll('[data-sonner-toast][data-type="success"], li[data-type="success"]')` for ~2s window post-click. Selectors added by this feature: select-all-checkins, select-checkin-<id>, delete-checkin-<id>, delete-selected-btn, clear-all-checkins-btn, map-selection-hint, show-all-pins-btn, job-success-heading, job-success-body, job-success-button, success-heading, success-body, checkin-again-btn.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all 3 features under review work correctly on both API and UI layers. The single failing backend test (test_migration_added_contact_fields) is a stale assertion from iteration_3 admin-edit test that removed email+phone from a job; the migration code intentionally only runs when form_heading is missing (one-time). No product bug.
